reviews.review_description: Stuck on title screen and won’t go past that initial screen.

Great app to overcome your fears, step by step with clear explanations.
Recommended!

Stopped working on quest 2 when I purchased the  quest 3 and still not working on both headsets

What is happening?

I used it for a while which i have a height of fear and this app gave me the confidence and the ability to move on and trust myself.
After playing the app i have less fear going on a high floor building and looking a bit closer from the balcony.
Moreover i can step closer to my balcony at home.

Thank you very much for that app!!!

Have you ever tried leaning over a balcony just to collect another star?  
I have!

This is a brilliant app for those who wish to challenge their fears of heights and closed spaces in a safe, comfortable, and very fun way. 

P.s. I really enjoyed the idea that It didn’t require any controllers, and I could walk and interact using only my hands in a very intuitive way.

developer_response.body: Happy to hear that you loved it and also happy to hear about the hand-tracking feature (The fact that you can play without the controllers).

reviews.review_description: This app is amazing. It solves a real world fears by using a virtual one. They are dealing with a big challenge, and I feel they are doing it very well. Great experience. Great app. Highly recommended.

developer_response.body: You're Amazing we're just trying to help you understand it a bit better and live your life to the fullest.

reviews.review_description: The app allows those dealing with a fear of heights to gradually experience the fear of heights in a safe place and reduce it

An excellent idea for using virtual reality to deal with real fears
In my opinion, it is also a good way to introduce virtual reality to new people
Especially those who are afraid of it - a kind of soft landing in this world.

Although I personally do not suffer from fear of any of the things that were in the game, it is undoubtedly instructive and cool to see how people with such and such fears can be treated with the help of the game.

I was really impressed and I truly believe that VR experiences such as this one are the future of immersive therapy apps!

As a UX designer and a consultant for XR, I've tried and reviewed many  XR medical and defense apps made by friends and colleagues in the XR industry. And BraVeR really impressed me. It is truly unique, with a brilliant onboarding and fun gamification!

Well done! 
Avi

Using VR for treatment, is one of the milestones in my opinion to a more mainstream adaption of the medium. The app does a very good job exposing you slowly to your fears, teaching you the mechanics of anxiety and coping methods. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. We're working around the clock to launch more experiences for more use cases and every feedback like this is giving us some extra fuel. 
Thanks 🙏

reviews.review_description: I gave this app a try to help deal with my claustrophobia and I must GIVE A WARNING. The entire duration you are sick on the spot which have me even more anxiety. There a other much better options

I think this app is a great way dealing with things that we are not dealing in our day routine, all of those little things that we afraid of and this app is giving the oportunity to slowly extract our little fears from our minds

If you are afraid of heights,  this is a great tool to help you face it.
Very relaxing world that gives you confident.
I'm waiting for the next phases to come :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We've much more than just the fear of Heights experience - Fear of closed places, Preparation for MRI Scans, Fear of cockroaches (very soon), and much more to come.

reviews.review_description:
Started playing and could not stop for an hour straight.
Love the experience and hope it will help me treat my fear of heights.
Will update later.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. We're working around the clock to launch more experiences for more use cases and every feedback like this is giving us some extra fuel. 
Thanks 🙏

reviews.review_title: Fight your fear and give this a try
reviews.review_description:
Excellent execution and lots of value to the community and VR in general. 
Help yourself concur you fear, in a safe and secure manner. 

Great job!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. We're working around the clock to launch more experiences for more use cases and every feedback like this is giving us some extra fuel. 
Thanks 🙏

reviews.review_description:
BraVer app is absolutely a game changer!
This app helped me face my worst fears in a fun and exciting new way!
In addition, with Val, the virtual companion, I learned cool tools such as breathing exercises and psychoeducation.
Highly recommendation on this platform.

developer_response.body: Thanks - it means the world to us.

reviews.review_description:
This app is amazing. It simulate real life experience in a very realistic way and this is it biggest advantage.
Because the feeling is so real facing situations were you on a high building makes your body to feel that you on a high building. In the the app you start with low levels of heights and slowly but steady you are advancing to higher levels.
It's perfect!
Thank you so much!
As someone with extreme fear of heights, walking through the app is a great experience. Very relaxing and the pace is great!!! Thank you!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! Super-Happy to hear you loved it. 
By the way - We've much more than just the fear of Heights experience - Fear of closed places, Preparation for MRI Scans, Fear of cockroaches (very soon), and much more to come.

reviews.review_description:
Wow! I honestly cannot recommend this app enough. I appreciated the game graphics and design but the clinch for me was little miss Val, she really helped out
I'm kind of new to Oculus so the incremental increase of the game really helped me get used to the surroundings. Thank you braver team!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. We're working around the clock to launch more experiences for more use cases and every feedback like this is giving us some extra fuel. 
Thanks 🙏
